{{Infobox sacred-art
| name = Nakothi's song
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Nakothi]]'s song refers to the persistent and powerful auditory presence emanating from the [[Heart of Nakothi]]. This phenomenon serves as a manifestation of the will of the [[Great Elder]], known as the [[Dead Mother]], who continues to exert influence even after death. The song is described as a constant undercurrent that can be felt by those with [[Reader]]'s senses and has the ability to disturb sleep or cause dreams of death. It can range in intensity from a whisper or croon to a deafening, shrill crescendo. Beyond its auditory nature, the song is closely linked to [[Nakothi]]'s desire to find a host or vessel to grant her glorious purpose and escape, often accompanied by her whispering or hissing promises of power.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nakothi]]'s song exists as a constant, loud undercurrent that can be felt directly through the senses of a [[Reader]]. The melody resonates between [[Shera]]'s left-hand knife and the [[Heart]], eventually rising to a deafening crescendo. Beyond its volume, the song croons various messages to those who listen.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nakothi's song]] resonates between the [[Heart]] and [[Shera]]'s left-hand knife.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The song of [[Nakothi]] rose to a deafening crescendo.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nakothi's song]] is a constant undercurrent that can be felt directly with a [[Reader]]'s senses.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nakothi's song]] is not quiet.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Nakothi]]’s song croons messages to the listener.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Nakothi's song]] croons to children to be remade.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c26">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“You are cold, the Heart crooned. You are weak, you are sick. Let me make you strong, let me take away your pain...<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Sacred Arts]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
